title: linum hirsutum subsp. hirsutum
intro: Linum hirsutum subsp. hirsutum, also known as California flax, is a perennial plant that belongs to the flax family (Linaceae) and is native to the western coast of North America. The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Linum hirsutum subsp. hirsutum include its ability to soothe skin irritations, reduce inflammation, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of California flax may include teas, infusions, and salves, which can be used topically to treat skin conditions or taken internally to promote overall health and well-being.
